Fredric C. Nelson, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff/Cross Defendant: Chinatown Community Development Center, and with Anna Yee from CCDC.

Case settled, terms read into the record and to be reduced in writing, payment of $50,000.00 to the Lees within 14 days for full satisfactory of all claims and for dismissal of the entire case.
